---
title: "‘Establishing Identity: Editorial Correspondence from the Early Years of The Monthly Packet’"
---

## ‘Establishing Identity: Editorial Correspondence from the Early Years of The Monthly Packet’

**Author:** June Sturrock
**Date:** 2006
**Imprint:** <i>Victorian Periodicals Review </i>39.3  266-279

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
